---
title: "Kyle Cahitas"
subtitle: "Environmental Data Scientist | Cal Poly SLO"
image: assets/photos/kyle_cahitas.jpg
about:
  template: trestles       # Quarto's built-in bio templates: jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Yahitas
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kcahitas@calpoly.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/kylecahitas
---

I am an environmental scientist finishing an MS in Environmental Science and
Management at Cal Poly San Luis Obispo. My work sits where GIS, applied
statistics, and machine learning meet: survey-based social science, geospatial
modeling, and applied ML for environmental monitoring.

I build reproducible pipelines, in R and Python, that document every step from
raw data to reported result. My thesis looks at the structural factors behind
how California strawberry growers dispose of used agricultural plastic.
